title: Vanilla Smoothie
body:
![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d5e7e53f0909c2223d61102bc729ebf441a32a5.png) Hi! The aim of this pack is to provide simpler textures than the original ones, but also similar, in a way: building/nature blocks maintain the original palettes and crafting/decoration blocks are mostly a smoother version of the original. I was inspired by the style used in the official Minecraft launcher artworks and I started drawing only a couple of textures as a test, but then I thought it was worth it to continue. It's not 100% complete and I don't think it will ever be (I'm not currently planning to redraw items, plants and mobs, except for some exceptions) but as for blocks, they are mostly there. ![cover2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dbec30675afdc52440b929a6b1f815b0471a3b06.jpeg)
More screenshots ![Mixed forest, taken with Complementary Shaders Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bhgDXCzP/images/766910489e91aaea6cde2c459137826980b7946d.jpeg) ![Happy Ghast, taken with Complementary Shaders Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bhgDXCzP/images/1ed187d816512396a021a9c9d3e0e7e756f7e032.jpeg) ![Nether Basalt Deltas, taken with Complementary Shaders Reimagined](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/bhgDXCzP/images/916bbeab355e745ffd9206ec8dbf7ee492523f88.png) These are taken with Iris + Complementary Shaders Reimagined.

_Dropping this here if you'd like to support me with a small donation :) ._ --- **Here you can find the Bedrock version:**

### Thank you very much, I hope you like the pack!
